case_title: JINHEE PARK VS. SONIA FRANCISCA CAAMANO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2016 - JUDGMENT.
RETURN MAIL- NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARK, JINHEE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CAAMANO, SONIA FRANCISCA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PARK, JINHEE AS TO DEFENDANT CAAMANO, SONIA FRANCISCA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED APR-24-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAAMANO, SONIA FRANCISCA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. WITNESS TAHO PHAM TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
